name: fail-closed-security-hooks
description: Enterprise security controls for Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock. Fail-closed PII/secrets guard, git policy guard, tamper-evident HMAC hash-chained audit log, and a token-budget circuit breaker — all wrapped by a telemetry shim that converts silent hook failures into explicit denials. Built for regulated industries (banking, healthcare, government); pairs with managed-settings + Terraform for un-removable enforcement.
